title: BEM-840 mailbox report
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:00 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
results=[]
rd=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results')
if rd.exists():
    for p in sorted(rd.glob('*.status.json')):
        try: data=json.loads(read(p))
        except Exception as exc: data={'status':'unparsed','error':str(exc),'text':read(p)[:500]}
        results.append({'path':str(p),'data':data})
runtime=load('governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json')
real=[]; blockers=[]
d=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt')
if d.exists():
    for p in sorted(d.glob('*')):
        if p.is_file():
            txt=read(p); up=txt.upper(); low=(p.name+' '+txt).lower()
            bad='NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL' in up or 'RUNTIME BLOCKER' in up or 'not treat this as claude' in low
            ok=('DECISION:' in up and ('APPROVED' in up or 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up or 'BLOCKED' in up) and ('CLAUDE RESPONSE' in up or 'Claude Internal Auditor' in txt))
            if bad: blockers.append(str(p))
            elif ok: real.append(str(p))
missing=[]
if not results: missing.append('workflow_dispatch_results')
if not (runtime.get('started_at') or runtime.get('completed_at')): missing.append('claude_runtime_state')
if not real: missing.append('real_claude_response')
status='system_not_ready' if missing else 'system_ready'
report_lines=[
 '# BEM-840 | GPT-Claude Mailbox Mechanism Error Report', '',
 'Дата: '+created, '',
 'Status: '+status, '',
 '## PASS criteria',
 '1. workflow_dispatch_results status exists: '+str(bool(results)),
 '2. Claude runtime start/completion exists: '+str(bool(runtime.get('started_at') or runtime.get('completed_at'))),
 '3. real Claude response exists: '+str(bool(real)), '',
 '## Current missing proofs',
 ', '.join(missing) if missing else 'none', '',
 '## Mechanism',
 'GPT writes request to governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude or queues dispatch item in governance/workflow_dispatch_queue.',
 'Codex Runner processes queue and should create governance/workflow_dispatch_results/*.status.json.',
 'Claude dispatcher workflow should write governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json.',
 'Claude should write real response to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/.', '',
 '## Main historical errors',
 '- Malformed JSON in workflow_dispatch_queue caused JSONDecodeError and blocked queue processing.',
 '- Fallback/blocker files were at risk of being confused with real Claude response; now they are explicitly filtered.',
 '- Reports were incorrectly treated as stopping points; this is a process violation.', '',
 '## Current conclusion',
 'System is not proven ready until missing proofs are empty.'
]
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':status,'missing':missing,'dispatch_results_tail':results[-10:],'runtime_started_at':runtime.get('started_at'),'runtime_completed_at':runtime.get('completed_at'),'real_responses':real[-10:],'blocker_files':blockers[-10:],'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem840_mailbox_mechanism_error_report.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_mailbox_mechanism_error_report.md').write_text(sep.join(report_lines)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: repair missing proofs '+', '.join(missing)+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Missing: '+', '.join(missing)+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem840_mailbox_mechanism_error_report.json','governance/reports/bem840_mailbox_mechanism_error_report.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Created mailbox mechanism error report and current readiness state using the three-proof contract')
"""
No issue comments.
